reviews.review_title: Fun idea/s but needs a lot of work
reviews.review_description:
I managed to get to the final/3rd room both times I played (though I experienced some of the bugs/glitches mentioned in other reviews)
Both times, I would get to what seemed like the final puzzle within the room and nothing would work. I think there's something missing, be it a code, action, item, or whatever. I think the game/maker(s) have potential but could use some playtesting/ers before they proceed.
Also, small gripe- the artwork in the preview image doesn't match the game. It's small but the preview art looked fun and enticing.

Like other reviews said, you're so tall, which is a bit disorienting, but other than that (and the kinda goofy mummies) the atmosphere was pretty good.  The scroll pieces can be a bit buggy on the final level, but overall, it was a pretty cool experience, and pretty well done.  I would give it a little more than 3.5 stars, but I'll round up to four, because it was pretty fun.

Was only able to play in first room for a few minutes.  Room tilts at times, player is in the air instead of on the ground, gets you dizzy, goes to black screen until move control back and forth.  There is great potential here, just need to fix the bugs, fix height of player. Looking forward to fixes and trying again but I feel too soon to be charging when still with bugs like this.  Love escape room games, please work on it.  Thank you

great Idea and one of my favorite teams (eguptian)  but the problem is is the room keeps adjusting so you’re floating and if something drops past a certain point you can’t pick it up and you have to restart the level.
